channel.title: All Registered Polls for the European Parliament
channel.description: All Registered Polls for the European Parliament

item.title: Opinion Poll by Demoskop for Aftonbladet and Svenska Dagbladet, 5–17 June 2026 – Seating Plan Projection
item.description:
Seating plan projection for the European Parliament
11 seats needed for a majority
Opinion poll by Demoskop for Aftonbladet and Svenska Dagbladet, 5–17 June 2026
Details on https://filipvanlaenen.github.io/swedish_ep_polls/2026-06-17-Demoskop.html
